projectDescription: A daily AI safety intelligence briefing that aggregates 114 RSS feeds, analyzes them with an agentic Claude pipeline, and publishes a ranked daily dossier every morning.
keyFeatures: Daily AI safety briefing aggregated from 114 curated RSS feeds
Agentic editorial pipeline modeled after a real newsroom (6 SME editors + Chief Editor)
P(Doom) Tracker — sentiment scoring with doom/bloom points over time
Event Timeline — story arcs tracking how narratives develop across multiple dossiers
Context Graph — interactive knowledge graph of entities, relationships, and causal connections
Daily podcast with forced word-level transcript alignment
RSS feed and LLM-friendly plain-text endpoint
White-label multi-tenant architecture for custom domain deployments
Category filtering: Safety, Policy, Models, Industry, Security
publicApiSurface: GET /rss — RSS feed (XML, 30 most recent dossiers)
GET /llms-full.txt — LLM-friendly plain-text summary of today's dossier
GET /timeline — event timeline with story arcs
GET /tracker — P(Doom) tracker with charts and table
GET /archive — full archive of past dossiers
POST /api/admin/test-feed — feed health check and discovery
